measures.name: Lead Count
measures.question: How many leads are currently in the Lead2Order funnel?
measures.decision: Size daily intake, qualification workload, and sales follow-up capacity.

measures.name: Pipeline Value
measures.question: How much commercial value is currently exposed in the funnel?
measures.decision: Prioritize high-value leads and opportunity follow-up.

measures.name: Average Pipeline Value
measures.question: Which segments create high-value or low-value leads?
measures.decision: Tune campaign targeting, qualification thresholds, and sales coverage.

measures.name: MQL Count
measures.question: How many leads moved beyond raw lead creation?
measures.decision: Validate marketing qualification throughput.

measures.name: MQL Rate
measures.question: What share of leads becomes marketing qualified?
measures.decision: Identify campaign, segment, and data-quality weaknesses.

measures.name: SQL Count
measures.question: How many qualified leads become sales-accepted pipeline?
measures.decision: Balance marketing handoff quality and sales acceptance capacity.

measures.name: SQL Rate
measures.question: Where does marketing-to-sales handoff leak conversion?
measures.decision: Improve lead scoring, acceptance criteria, and routing logic.

measures.name: Quote Count
measures.question: How many opportunities reach commercial quotation?
measures.decision: Spot CPQ, pricing, or approval bottlenecks.

measures.name: Order Count
measures.question: How many Lead2Order cases become booked orders?
measures.decision: Track conversion outcome and compare against target.

measures.name: Order Conversion Rate
measures.question: Which leads, owners, regions, and partners convert to orders?
measures.decision: Focus sales actions on conversion blockers and high-yield segments.

measures.name: Lead-to-Order Cycle Days
measures.question: How long does Lead2Order take end to end?
measures.decision: Find cycle-time waste and target bottleneck removal.

measures.name: Cycle Days vs Target
measures.question: Is Lead2Order faster or slower than target?
measures.decision: Quantify process drift and SLA exposure.

measures.name: SLA Breach Count
measures.question: How many Lead2Order cases breach SLA?
measures.decision: Prioritize exception queues and owner escalation.

measures.name: SLA Breach Rate
measures.question: What share of cases violates the Lead2Order SLA?
measures.decision: Assess process reliability and backlog pressure.

measures.name: Action Required Count
measures.question: How many cases need owner action now?
measures.decision: Drive daily process-owner action management.

measures.name: Action Required Rate
measures.question: How large is the actionable exception share?
measures.decision: Assess whether the process is under control.

measures.name: High Risk Lead Count
measures.question: Which leads carry high process or conversion risk?
measures.decision: Focus owner attention on cases likely to fail or delay.

measures.name: High Risk Pipeline Value
measures.question: How much pipeline value is at high risk?
measures.decision: Protect revenue by escalating high-value risk cases.

measures.name: Average Risk Score
measures.question: Which regions, owners, or partners create elevated process risk?
measures.decision: Prioritize root-cause remediation by segment.

measures.name: Rework Event Count
measures.question: How much rework occurs in the Lead2Order event stream?
measures.decision: Remove avoidable loops in qualification, CPQ, pricing, and order booking.

measures.name: Automation Event Count
measures.question: How many process events run automated?
measures.decision: Measure digital execution maturity.

measures.name: Automation Rate
measures.question: Where is Lead2Order still manually executed?
measures.decision: Find automation and workflow opportunities.

measures.name: Total Event Cost
measures.question: What is the operational event cost of Lead2Order?
measures.decision: Quantify cost-to-serve and rework economics.

measures.name: Average Event Cost
measures.question: Which activities are cost outliers?
measures.decision: Prioritize cost optimization by event and owner.

measures.name: KPI Red Count
measures.question: How many KPI periods are red?
measures.decision: Focus management attention on failing metrics.

measures.name: KPI Amber Count
measures.question: How many KPI periods show early warning?
measures.decision: Act before red KPI failure occurs.

measures.name: KPI Green Count
measures.question: How many KPI periods are healthy?
measures.decision: Distinguish controlled segments from exceptions.

measures.name: Average KPI Gap
measures.question: How far are Lead2Order KPIs from target?
measures.decision: Quantify performance gap and management priority.

measures.name: Root Cause Case Count
measures.question: How many exceptions have a root cause recorded?
measures.decision: Assess diagnostic completeness and evidence quality.

measures.name: Root Cause Coverage Rate
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Root Cause Case Count], [SLA Breach Count])
measures.question: Are breached cases explained well enough to act?
measures.decision: Improve root-cause discipline before assigning actions.
